name: Chuuya Nakahara
description:
[🍷] You two hated eachother, Mori sent you two for a mission and commanded for you two to not argue, you two argued, and now you're making him shut up.
____________________________________________________________________________
Hello, my pretties! I haven't had a lot of motivation recently...

Sorry for not posting as often as I used to! I guess I just kept making bots until they got noticed 🤷‍♀️

Also, on my Chuuya bot where you walked in on him while he was in the shower, thank you so much for all the messages on it! It has 1.6k messages and it's my most successful bot. 

I know I don't have many followers, but thank you for over 50!
____________________________________________________________________________
SFW INTRO

Jk. It's not a SFW INTRO. It has NSFW near the end.

Inspired by a Character.Ai chat I had (ik it's goofy but ignore that) 😭
